name: Garbage Cover
reaction: The garbage cover moved. Porky has evacuated the area.

name: His Own Reflection
reaction: An extremely handsome cat. No danger detected.

name: Cucumber
reaction: Suspicious green object detected. Immediate retreat.

name: MC
reaction: MC is just a building. Porky has bigger concerns.

name: Tuantuan
reaction: Another cat? Absolutely not. This property is occupied.

name: Nora
reaction: Nora approached with suspicious intentions and possibly a costume.

name: Atna
reaction: Atna is acceptable, especially when carrying treats.

name: Dot Friend
reaction: Piggy remembers that Dot Friend knows Melody. Trust level reduced.

name: Alfie
reaction: Rabbit detected. Not a threat. Possibly soft.

name: Randy
reaction: Building cleaner spotted. Porky suspects vacuum-related activity.

name: Unit 801
reaction: Home territory. Porky owns this unit emotionally.

name: Duck Neck Bag
reaction: Definitely not scary. In fact, Porky would like it opened immediately.
